projectName: Curly sherpa teddy gold organza bow
title: Sherpa teddy — restuffed with a fresh bow
description: This sherpa teddy needed a full refresh and a new organza bow. We deep cleaned, restuffed, and tied a replacement ribbon.
itemDetails: This curly sherpa teddy with gold organza bow is a formal gift-bear style commonly sold for celebration occasions such as anniversaries and baby gifts. Curly sherpa textures and decorative bow trims became especially common in 2000s-present plush lines. Typical materials include polyester sherpa outer fabric, polyester fill, and lightweight organza or satin ribbon accessories.
repairDetails: This curly sherpa teddy with a gold organza bow needed cleaning, stuffing, and ribbon work. We deep cleaned, restuffed, and replaced the ribbon so the gift look is restored.
